description: Machine-readable catalog of the 29 MCP tools the OpenCodeHub server registers. Generated to be fetched by an AI coding agent that wants the catalog without scraping the docs.

families.group: Cross-repo federation tools (require a named group).

tools.name: list_repos
tools.description: List all repos indexed on this machine.
tools.when_to_use: The agent does not know what repos are indexed.
tools.when_not_to_use: You already know the target repo — pass repo_uri directly.
tools.signature_sketch: list_repos() -> { repos: Array<{name, repo_uri, default_branch, group?, root, indexed_at, graph_hash}> }

tools.name: query
tools.description: Hybrid BM25 + filter-aware HNSW search over the graph, results grouped by execution-flow process.
tools.when_to_use: You want symbols, files, or communities for a natural-language phrase.
tools.when_not_to_use: You need precise callers/callees of a known symbol — call context instead.
tools.signature_sketch: query({text, repo?, repo_uri?, limit?, granularity?, bm25_only?, goal?, context?}) -> {processes, symbols, next_steps}

tools.name: context
tools.description: 360-degree view of one symbol: callers, callees, ACCESSES edges, processes the symbol participates in.
tools.when_to_use: You have a specific symbol and need its inbound + outbound graph edges.
tools.when_not_to_use: You only have a fuzzy concept — call query first.
tools.signature_sketch: context({symbol, repo?, repo_uri?, file_path?, kind?}) -> {target, callers, callees, accesses, processes, next_steps}

tools.name: impact
tools.description: Blast radius for one symbol — direct callers, transitive callers, affected processes, risk tier.
tools.when_to_use: You're about to edit a symbol and need to know what depends on it.
tools.when_not_to_use: Your change is purely additive (new file, new function with no callers).
tools.signature_sketch: impact({symbol, repo?, repo_uri?, depth?, direction?}) -> {target, direct_callers, transitive_callers, affected_processes, risk, confidence, next_steps}

tools.name: detect_changes
tools.description: Map a staged or compared git diff to symbols, files, and processes with risk tiers.
tools.when_to_use: After staging edits, before opening a PR.
tools.when_not_to_use: Tree is clean — the tool refuses with a helpful error.
tools.signature_sketch: detect_changes({repo?, repo_uri?, scope?, compare_ref?, strict?}) -> {symbols, files, processes, max_risk, next_steps}

tools.name: rename
tools.description: Coordinated multi-file symbol rename with confidence-tagged edits. Default mode is dry-run.
tools.when_to_use: Renaming a symbol used across multiple files.
tools.when_not_to_use: The rename is in a single file — let the editor handle it.
tools.signature_sketch: rename({from, to, repo?, repo_uri?, dry_run?}) -> {edits, cross_module_refs, next_steps}

tools.name: sql
tools.description: Read-only SQL against the graph store. 5-second timeout.
tools.when_to_use: Custom view of the graph that no other tool exposes.
tools.when_not_to_use: A typed tool (context, impact, query) already covers the question.
tools.signature_sketch: sql({query, repo?, repo_uri?}) -> {rows, row_count, next_steps}
tools.example: sql({query: 'SELECT name, file_path FROM nodes WHERE kind = ? LIMIT 10', params: ['Class']})

tools.name: group_list
tools.description: List the cross-repo groups configured on this machine.
tools.when_to_use: Always safe before fanning out across a fleet.
tools.when_not_to_use: You already know the group name.
tools.signature_sketch: group_list() -> {groups: Array<{name, description?, member_repo_uris}>}

tools.name: group_query
tools.description: BM25 + RRF over every member repo in a group.
tools.when_to_use: One query across an entire fleet of microservices.
tools.when_not_to_use: Single-repo query — call query directly.
tools.signature_sketch: group_query({group, text, limit?}) -> {group, results: Array<{repo_uri, hits}>, next_steps}

tools.name: group_status
tools.description: Per-repo staleness audit across a group.
tools.when_to_use: Before relying on cross-repo answers.
tools.when_not_to_use: Single-repo staleness — read the _meta envelope.
tools.signature_sketch: group_status({group}) -> {group, repos: Array<{repo_uri, indexed_at, graph_hash, staleness_lag_commits}>}

tools.name: group_contracts
tools.description: Cross-repo HTTP contract matrix — producer routes paired with consumer fetches.
tools.when_to_use: Mapping route blast-radius across services.
tools.when_not_to_use: Single-repo route map — call route_map.
tools.signature_sketch: group_contracts({group}) -> {contracts: Array<{producer_repo_uri, route, consumer_repo_uri, handler}>, unresolved_fetches}

tools.name: group_cross_repo_links
tools.description: Audit trail of every typed cross-repo edge with both endpoints qualified by repo_uri.
tools.when_to_use: Auditing cross-repo dependencies.
tools.when_not_to_use: Single-repo edges — call context.
tools.signature_sketch: group_cross_repo_links({group}) -> {links: Array<{source_repo_uri, target_repo_uri, source_doc_path, target_doc_path, relation}>}

tools.name: group_sync
tools.description: Rebuild the cross-repo contract registry and link table after a member has been re-indexed.
tools.when_to_use: After codehub analyze on any group member.
tools.when_not_to_use: You only re-indexed a non-group repo.
tools.signature_sketch: group_sync({group}) -> {group, contracts_written, cross_links_written, next_steps}

tools.name: scan
tools.description: Run scanners and ingest findings into the graph. Spawns processes (openWorldHint=true).
tools.when_to_use: You want fresh SARIF findings.
tools.when_not_to_use: Browsing existing findings — call list_findings.
tools.signature_sketch: scan({repo?, repo_uri?, scanners?, severity?, concurrency?, timeout_ms?}) -> {scanners_run, sarif_path, summary, next_steps}

tools.name: list_findings
tools.description: List SARIF findings stored in the graph.
tools.when_to_use: Browse findings without re-running scanners.
tools.when_not_to_use: You need a fresh scan — call scan.
tools.signature_sketch: list_findings({repo?, repo_uri?, severity?, tool?}) -> {findings, next_steps}

tools.name: list_findings_delta
tools.description: Diff the current scan against a baseline SARIF.
tools.when_to_use: PR-time delta between current scan and a frozen baseline.
tools.when_not_to_use: Single-snapshot view — call list_findings.
tools.signature_sketch: list_findings_delta({baseline, repo?, repo_uri?}) -> {new, fixed, unchanged, updated, next_steps}

tools.name: list_dead_code
tools.description: Symbols with zero in-graph references and dead exports.
tools.when_to_use: Cleanup pass on a repo.
tools.when_not_to_use: Looking for one specific symbol's callers — call context.
tools.signature_sketch: list_dead_code({repo?, repo_uri?}) -> {candidates: Array<{id, name, file_path, kind, reason}>}

tools.name: remove_dead_code
tools.description: Remove specific dead symbols from disk. Default mode is dry-run.
tools.when_to_use: After list_dead_code, with explicit targets.
tools.when_not_to_use: Speculative cleanup — always dry-run first.
tools.signature_sketch: remove_dead_code({repo?, repo_uri?, targets, dry_run?}) -> {removed, skipped, next_steps}

tools.name: license_audit
tools.description: Tier the dependency license posture: copyleft, unknown, proprietary, permissive.
tools.when_to_use: Pre-release supply-chain audit.
tools.when_not_to_use: You only need the dep list — call dependencies.
tools.signature_sketch: license_audit({repo?, repo_uri?}) -> {tiers, dependencies, next_steps}

tools.name: verdict
tools.description: 5-tier PR decision with a deterministic exit code (0/1/2/3).
tools.when_to_use: CI-time merge gate.
tools.when_not_to_use: Local exploratory analysis — call detect_changes.
tools.signature_sketch: verdict({repo?, repo_uri?, base?, head?}) -> {tier, exit_code, reasons, signals}

tools.name: risk_trends
tools.description: Per-community risk trend lines plus a 30-day projection.
tools.when_to_use: Quarterly review of where risk is concentrating.
tools.when_not_to_use: PR-time decision — call verdict.
tools.signature_sketch: risk_trends({repo?, repo_uri?}) -> {communities: Array<{id, name, trend, projection_30d, drivers}>}

tools.name: route_map
tools.description: Every HTTP route in the repo with its handler and known consumers.
tools.when_to_use: Mapping the API surface.
tools.when_not_to_use: Cross-repo map — call group_contracts.
tools.signature_sketch: route_map({repo?, repo_uri?}) -> {routes: Array<{method, path, handler, consumers, framework}>}

tools.name: api_impact
tools.description: Blast radius for a route change. Walks FETCHES edges across repos when the repo is in a group.
tools.when_to_use: Before changing a public-facing route.
tools.when_not_to_use: Internal-only change — call impact.
tools.signature_sketch: api_impact({route, repo?, repo_uri?}) -> {route, direct_consumers, transitive_consumers, risk, next_steps}

tools.name: shape_check
tools.description: Validate that callers expect the response shape the handler currently returns.
tools.when_to_use: Catching contract drift.
tools.when_not_to_use: Generic schema validation — use the framework's tooling.
tools.signature_sketch: shape_check({route, repo?, repo_uri?}) -> {route, mismatches: Array<{consumer, expected, actual}>, next_steps}

tools.name: tool_map
tools.description: List MCP tools defined in the repo (for repos that ship their own MCP server).
tools.when_to_use: Documenting an MCP-providing repo.
tools.when_not_to_use: The repo doesn't ship an MCP server.
tools.signature_sketch: tool_map({repo?, repo_uri?}) -> {tools: Array<{name, file_path, schema, examples}>}

tools.name: project_profile
tools.description: Summary profile: language mix, entry points, top processes, owners.
tools.when_to_use: First read on an unfamiliar repo.
tools.when_not_to_use: You already have a specific question — call query / context.
tools.signature_sketch: project_profile({repo?, repo_uri?}) -> {languages, entry_points, top_processes, top_owners, frameworks, ia_types, api_contracts}

tools.name: dependencies
tools.description: Dependency inventory.
tools.when_to_use: Inventory questions; setup for license_audit.
tools.when_not_to_use: License-tier check — call license_audit directly.
tools.signature_sketch: dependencies({repo?, repo_uri?}) -> {production, development, peer, by_package_manager}

tools.name: owners
tools.description: Top contributors for a node (file or symbol).
tools.when_to_use: Routing a PR to the right reviewer.
tools.when_not_to_use: Generic CODEOWNERS read — use the file directly.
tools.signature_sketch: owners({node, repo?, repo_uri?}) -> {owners: Array<{name, email, share, last_touch}>, bus_factor}

tools.name: pack_codebase
tools.description: Produce a deterministic LLM-ready code-pack snapshot of the repo.
tools.when_to_use: Hand a model the whole repo in one payload.
tools.when_not_to_use: Targeted question — call query / context.
tools.signature_sketch: pack_codebase({repo?, repo_uri?, path?, style?, compress?, remove_comments?}) -> {output_path, item_count, total_chars, token_estimate, next_steps}
